title: WetBulbTemperatureResult
description: WetBulbTemperatureResult: A results object containing wet bulb temperature data.

Result.description: The value associated with the results object. Property has a quantity of type Temperature measured in [K].

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
